reference: There is no permanent cure for lumbar spondylosis if she is not willing to undergo surgery. Pain will be reduced only for a short time if she takes the medications; she has to take medications continually. Yes, motion will be restricted in the growing years.
text: There is no permanent cure for lumbar spondylosis if she is not willing to undergo surgery; pain will be reduced only for a short time if she takes medications. She has to take medications continually. Yes, motion will be restricted in the growing years.
